Este es un breve informe del progreso de la PoV (Prueba de Valor) de Turbonomic. Es nuestro compromiso proveer estos reportes semanalmente para resaltar eventos, temas y requerimientos claves.
**Logros de esta semana**
* Validación de la implementación de Turbo y acceso a este a la cuenta de Dev en AWS
* Turbonomic está otorgando la visibilidad completa de las 39+ VMs en la cuenta de Desarrollo
**Plan para la próxima semana**
* Reunión de seguimiento el miércoles 11 a las 14:00 hrs Buenos Aires
* Conectar Turbonomic al ambiente de VCenter (read-only)
**Temas pendientes**
* Validar la posibilidad de conectar el ambiente de producción de AWS
* Entrega de una nueva licencia Turbonomic que avanze acceso a la plataforma.
* Validar que
**Trabajo en curso**
* Business Case:
	* Turbonomic ya identificó un ahorro potencial de $547.45/mes = $6.5K/Año en dicha suscripción por medio de 132 acciones de tiempo real
Gracias por su atención y buen fin de semana.
Saludos.

Tema: Actualización ejecutiva: Turbonomic @ SwissMedical
< > Y equipo SwissMedical:
Este mensaje es un breve informe del progreso de la prueba de valor (PoV) de Turbonomic. Estamos comprometidos a proveer estos reportes semanalmente para resaltar eventos, temas, y requerimientos que son claves para tener éxito.
**Logros de esta semana**
* Presentación de funciones de consolas donde Turbonomic señala (ver imagen abajo)
	* Ahorros
	* Optimizaciones
	* Riesgos
* Se han identificado credenciales para conectar Turbonomic con VMware/vSphere
**Temas pendientes**
* SwissMedical queda en validar la posibilidad de conectar el ambiente de producción de AWS
* SwissMedical queda en obtener permisos de Firewall para que Turbonomic se conecte con VMware/vSphere
* Turbonomic queda en confirmar que solo necesitamos el puerto 443 para conectar el vCenter
**Trabajo en curso**
* Validar la posibilidad de conectar el ambiente de producción de AWS
**Plan para la próxima semana**
* Reunión de seguimiento el jueves 19 a las 14 hr tiempo de Buenos Aires.
**Desarrollando el caso de negocio**
* El valor creado por turbonomic incrementa exponencialmente con el número de VMs. Incrementando el acceso de Turbonomic a vCenter y la cuenta de Producción en AWS para evaluar el poder de la Plataforma. Actualmente Turbonomic solo tiene acceso a 39 VMs.
Gracias por su atención y que tengan un excelente fin de semana.
Saludos.
Tema: Actualización ejecutiva: Turbonomic @ Swissmedical
< > Y equipo Swissmedical:
Este mensaje es un breve informe del progreso de la prueba de valor (PoV) de Turbonomic. Estamos comprometidos para proveer estos reportes semanalmente para resaltar eventos, temas y requerimientos que son claves para tener éxito.
**Logros de esta semana:**
* Presentacion de consolas en donde Turbonomic señala ya sea (ver imagen abajo),
* Ahorros
* Optimizaciones
* Riesgos
* Se han identificado credenciales para conectar Turbonomic con VMware/vSphere
**Temas pendientes:**
* Swissmedical ha quedado en validar la posibilidad de de conectar el ambiente de producción de AWS
* Swissmedical ha quedado en obtener permisos de Firewall para que Turbonomic se conecte con VMware/vSphere.
* Turbonomic ha quedado en confirmar si es que solo necesitamos el puerto 443 para conectar el Vcenter.
**Trabajo en curso:**
* Validar la posibilidad de conectar el ambiente de producción de AWS.
**Plan para la siguiente semana:**
* Reunion de seguimiento el Jueves 19 a las 14 hr tiempo de Buenos Aires.
**Desarrollando el caso de negocio:**
El valor que ya ha sido creado por Turbonomic se incrementó exponencialmente con el número de VMs. De tal forma que está incrementando el acceso de Turbonomic a Vcenter y la cuenta de producción en AWS para así evaluar el poder de la plataforma. Actualmente, Turbonomic solo tiene acceso a 39VMs.
Gracias por su atención y que tengan un excelente fin de semana.
Saludos.

* Automaitzación
* Mas efficiencia de costos
Con esos dos Statements si se esta utilizando al 100 por 100, al 70, al 50 o 30.
A esta altura no estamos tan bajos, estamos no si a un 70. No se.
Pero que otras cosas, como mantener la salud de la herramienta. Bueno eso los alineamento a seguir lo dira la mesa junto con ustedes. No lo voy a…
Que una herramienta se utilize en forma eficiente y todo lo que se pueda explotar es parte de de la mesa de trabajao.  Es una obiedad. Para que quiero una herramienta si no para usar todo su potencial.

Agus y JP,
Les comparto requerimientos/consideraciones para la Prueba de Valor ( PoV/PoC ) de IBM.Turbonomic y un ejemplo de los resultados que les entregaremos al final de la PoV/PoC
* -- Principales consideraciones para la instalación de Turbonomic ----
* Se requiere una VM con la siguiente capacidad:
8 vCPU, 64 GB de RAM y 1.5 TB de disco (puede ser thin provisioning)
[data:image/png;base64,](data:image/png;base64,)
* Preferiblemente el server debe pertenecer a la VLAN de Producción.
* Una cuenta de servicio (Real-Only) al sistema de virtualización donde se evaluará el PoV
* Una cuenta Read-Only al sistema de monitoreo APM (Dynatrace, AppDynamics, Instana, DataDog, etc)
	* IBM.Turbonomic se conectará a estas cuentas via llamadas API para obtener data parametrica.
Pan inicial de implementación seria:
* Importar la OVA de casi un 1G al ambiente de virtualizado.
* Enlace a la OVA:
* [https://download.vmturbo.com/appliance/release/8.4.6/turbonomic-t8c-8.4.6-20220218184154000.ova](https://download.vmturbo.com/appliance/release/8.4.6/turbonomic-t8c-8.4.6-20220218184154000.ova)Enlace para verificar el checksum del archivo:
* sha256sum: 22eeac21db8a4070b27b86bbdcb4f13e3e8be0580aa2297ab020b12bd5ae17a8
* Ya con la OVA bajada y con la VM aprovisionada (sin OS, la OVA incluye su propio OS)
	* Agendamos una reunión para guiarles durante la instalación.
	* en esta reunión tambien:
		* Conectamos a Turbonomic con las cuentas Read-Only ya creadas.
		* Este enlace te dará acceso a instrucciones en gran detalle para la instalación y requerimientos:
		* [https://docs.turbonomic.com/docApp/doc/index.html?config=Install_Pnt#!/MAPPED&DEFAULT_DEDICATED&showToc=1](https://docs.turbonomic.com/docApp/doc/index.html?config=Install_Pnt#!/MAPPED&DEFAULT_DEDICATED&showToc=1)Si se requiere agregar K8s, se debe agregar un componente llamado KubeTurbo que se describe aquí: GitHub - turbonomic/kubeturbo
Después de la instalación:
* Nuestras PoV/PoCs duran en promedio entre 2 y 5 semanas desde el momento que IBM.Turbonomic tiene acceso al sistema de será descubierto/mapeado y que se busca optimizar.
* El sistema empieza a entregar "Acciones" a los 10-20 minutos después de estar conectado vía llamadas API al sistema de virtualización y otras fuentes de data paramétrica.
* Una de las secciones de la PoV se concentrará en definir métricas para medir el nivel de éxito de la PoV y el potencial económico de un subsecuente despliegue de esta plataforma en la infraestructura del cliente.
Al final de la PoV:
* La conclusión de nuestra PoV incluye el desarrollo y presentación de un documento que cuantifica operacionalmente y económicamente el valor creado por esta plataforma de automatización.
* Mas allá de cuantificar el ROI, la Business Impact Presentation (BIP) mapeara algunas áreas de riesgo operacional en la infraestructura.
* Un ejemplo de este documento BIP (con el nombre ficticio "CosmicBank") está incluido en este email
Quedamos a sus órdenes,
* Carlos

A principios de diciember nuestro equipo local en Buenos Aires y el grupo de compras en Telecom acordaron varias transiciones, entre ellas hacer un contrato directo con IBM y transformar el bloque de licencias Perm a licencias Term. Tengo la propuesta economica revisada por compras. Si ese flujo de información es premisible, con gusto puedo enviar copia. En este mensaje incluyo solo la pagina que detalla que cada 3 licencias VDI se convertiran en una licencia sin restriciones.
Antes tenian 8700 Licensias para VM y 7700 licencias para VDI. Debido a la conversion (7700/3) las licencia VDI se convirtieron en 2567. Eso nos lleva al nuevo total de 8700+2567.
Ya le pedi a Luis la hoja excel que verifica que esa conversión explica al 100% que el numero total de licencias bajo de
Estoy buscando la hoja de tabulación que documenta la conversion de
Esa conversión

de información pero en este mensaje me voy a limitar a los basico por simplicidad y por que todav

Me toco investigar un poco antes de responder. La negociasci
Estoy dando respuesta al mensaje. Durante la negociasion entre el equipo de IBM en Buenos Aires y el Departamento de Compras se acordo en una transision de licencias Perm a Licencias Temp
Cuando el contrato cambio a IBM hubo una trancision de licencias permantes a temporales. Durante este process el equipo d compras negocio un descuento que nisi quiera me atrevo en
y lo que se ofreció fue que 3 licencias de VDI equivalen a una VM.

* Porque con Promiteus tu puedes medir transacciones con tiempo de respuesta de los servicios que tienes en Contenedores.
* "No estamos hablando de temas de contendores todavía, ahorita estamos hablando en equipo normal, VMs. y Prometeus, todas las metricas las sacamos con Telegraph y _____. Si utilizamo Prometeu pero no es nuestro Core”

* "Pensando en la transacción completa hay mucho brincos, ....determinar la cause, si pudiera ser inmendiata podria ser muy complicada. Un APM nos daría rapidamente la respuesta, si la applicaci;on este la base de datos. puede ser el tema de red, puede ser el application server, puede ser el Front End"”
* DaSilva pregunta "Y que pasa si no es nada de eso, que tal is es a nivel de infraestructura."?
* JoseLuis: "Eso tambien lo vemos, porque estamos obteniendo notas de la JBM, garbabe colectos, los gels, las threds, TODO ESO NO LOS DA LA APM y si todo eso lo tenemos en un Dashboard donde tenemos el comportamiento de cada uno de los parametros y de los tiempos de respuesta de las tracciónes podemos determinar rapidament la causa

IBM tiene una nueva tecnología dentro de su portafolio de soluciones AIOps.
Desde Houston, mi misión es dar a conocer cómo esta plataforma, la cúal automatiza en tiempo real la incesante re-configuración de parámetros de aprovisionamiento en DataCenters y Nubes; lograr la verdadera "elasticidad" del Full Stack--- siempre resguardando el óptimo desempeño de las aplicaciones que definen la experiencia web/mobile de los clientes.
Es posible que el equipo de IBM en {{country}} ya les dio a conocer esta nueva solución.
Si tal no es el caso, podemos programar una reunión Q&A/Demo para esta semana.
A tu ordenes,
* Carlos

Friends Family. Thank you for coming together in this beautiful afternoon to celebrate, as KADAN and SARA bring their lives together in matrimony.
We’ve come from near and far all of us in support of this couple’s life together. So let’s take a minute to appreciate the moment.
[Spanish]
Give thanks with me…
I invoke YOU, the greatest of all,
Who created all from thyself
Who sees all and is never seen.
We ask Your blessing for SARA and KADAN tonight as they enter into this cherished covenant. Watch over them, guide them and support them in their efforts on this day and evermore.
….amen
Quien tiene el honor de entregar a la novia.
Pepe / Rosita:
Now we will do the vow exchange, the couple has written their own vows. (Groom goes first) KADAN.
(Bride second) SARA
We ask You to bless this community of friends and family who pledge their love and support of SARA and KADAN’s marriage.
Infinite One, fly ahead of them Open the way Prepare the path Spirit of the sun Mother of the light Come to them! …..Amen
Now the ring exchange:
Who has the rings? [spanish to Max]
KADEN repeat after me: My dearest friend, •I'd like to join you by your side, •where we can gaze into the stars, And with this RING I ask you to be my bride.
SARA repeat after me: •And I with this ring ask you to be mine, •now and forever together, •for it is plain to see , •we're simply meant to be
When I say “and with this ring”
Left hand.

Gerry definition: It provides decisions in isolation. For example, it uses its stepbrother capiq to try to understand what the capacity is and DRS for placement. I can try to size up, but if the host doesn’t have the capacity it can lead to more problems. On top of that, it really doesn’t understand what the application is demanding. If you think about what vrops is doing, it’s just looking at virtualization layer. Therefore, I can size up the VM, but if the bottleneck is on heap of an application, it doesn’t have that understanding. If you think about the overall design, what vrops does is it collects a ton of data about your infrastructure, you set thresholds to alert you when it deviates from that threshold and then we go in and fix the issue which is reactive.
* Los portales de Banca por interne
* Los canales de aplicativo que dan a la nuevecita
1. [LIMITED] DRS actions are limited to the movement of VM from one Host to another.
2. [SILOED] The logic behind these actions is NOT based on an understanding of Application demand. All is seen throu the lents of "optimal" Host utilization
3. [REACTIVE] The logic behind these actions is based on static host utilization ratios and CPU and VMeM thresholds set manually by user.
4. [HALF BLIND] The logic ignores other utilization metrics (i.e. Network) and KPIs like RedyQ and Swapping.
5. [POWERLESS] It does not do sizing. It tries to solve for every problem with Vmotions. It has no awareness of the ability of provisioning a new host.
6. [SILOED] It only focuses on virtualization. DRS, SDRS and PDRS. These solution do not talk to each other as they each work under their own mindset.
Earlier this week during a 1:1, an SE told me that his readiness to take more ownership would be a bit higher if he had a couple Mulligans in his pocket.
As he described it, while a Mulligan is a do-over in golf, in this context it would be more like a “sorry about last-minute cancelling our 7am meeting but life happens, and I am using my Mulligan.”
I explained to him that there is no need for Mulligans, that I would understand. He insisted, that at least in his case, he dreads canceling a meeting with anyone that he reports to and that the get-out-of-the-meeting card would be nice to have.
Long story short, I told him he can have a couple Mulligans to use wisely and that all HR rules still apply. He seemed happy and ready to sell more.
If you need help with Training, Marketing or a couple Mulligans, let me know. My #1 job is to remove any obstacle that will keep you from exceeding your quota.

This is how we start to do is understand the interdependencies across your entire stack, show here with arrows.
But notice that the arrows are pointing down. That's because we always take a top down, application centric approach to understanding these interdependencies.
On top of that, we start to give you the current state of every layer in your application stack:
the yellow is the risk of Overprovisioning
red is shows Underprovisioning risk
and green is a healthy state.
Typically in our first meeting we discover that most of our potential clients already have an APM. A solution that is giving them a topology, if not of the complete stack, at least of a seccione of the stack. the most advance of these APMs will issue quick alerts everytime that a part of the environment has deviated from a treshold set by the user or by the system itself. This is were Turbonomic is different. Turbonomic is a control platform, that if used to it's full capacity, will not wait for things to break to take action. Turbonomic by fully understanding the complete supply and demand of resources, will give you or automatically implement actions that will drive and mantain a healthly environment.
But how can Turbonomic achieve this Preventive aproach? Turbonomic will use API calls to connect with every layer of your application stack: From the application, to the virtual machines, all the way down to the physical host and storage. This allows this Control Platform to have a top to bottom application centric understading of all the of all the interdependencies.
Lets zoom in. Using its understand of all interdependencies, not a threshold, is indicating that ___ of the virtual machines are contributing to the health of the application. It is also telling you that, in the context of the complete stack, ____ percent are creating under provicionin risk. But more importantly, it is telling you that ___ percent of the VMs are creating over provisioning risk, which often for the system as a whole is much worsk that Underprovisioning.
And this complete understanding is reflected here.
installed APM solution is already allowing the administrators to set tresholds so that alarms are generated as soon as the environment has deviated from that those thresholds. And True! until recently that was best available option.
Alex Lazarini is head of a new group in Microsoft, Solutions Assessments, that has less than 2 years. They work with a group of consultants that help the client create a path to the cloud from On-Prem.
They do consulting, advisory work with the clients.
* they do this throu interviews
* workshops
* or running 3rd party and MS solutions
	* Azure Migrate
	* Data Migration Assistant
	* Movernos
	* Cloudomize
	* Block 64
	* Turbonomic
As part of the client engagement, on of the Deliverables is a an analysis that shows an optimal path to migrate them to the cloud.
The Solutions Assessments has one team dedicated
* Enterprise
* Mid-Business
* Small Business
Solutions Assessments is considered a pre-sales area within microsoft.
The existing teams at Solutions Assesments have not had a Demo of Turbonomic.
Alex wants to schedule a session for a Demo of Turbonomics (notice that the focus should be on migration to the cloud)
Alex would also like to learn about specific use cases.
When asked what does turbonomic does, Alex said: It provides insights to make the business case to move to the cloud.
As part of their analysis. they do
-Resource consuption analysis
-Right Sizing with Mover, (note: but this is probably done in static way)
Alex thinks it would be a good idead to set up a separate session solely focus on how turbonomic can support their Resource Consumption Analysis activities
Alex would like a tool that does more that just provide the client with analyiss.
Alex mentioned several times that his team will need to understand the meaningful diferences between Turbonomic an similar tools.
Agustin used to be responsible for all the Azure selling team in Mexico.
Agustin is now leading the Channel Sales team.
* As part of these new responsibility, Microsoft should co-sell with Turbonomic at the Enterprise level in Mexico.
* His team is responsible for supporting all the enterprise selling teams.
* He has a vision to re-launch the comercial allianze between the two companies
* Key to this relauch is Alex. Alex is leading all the assesments. This would be a low hanging frute where we it can be determine how much value Turbo can create.
* Another part of this relauch is the SDU Team who is reponsible for the selling of Azure consumptions or Azure solution and the implementation of those solutions in the customers environment.
SDU
Alfredo —> Alfredo Badillo Chávez / Data & AI Sales Director at Microsoft

Mike will reach out to our Partner Development Manager who is assigned to this region.
Valentin expects that meeting to happen.
!!!!Valentin will invite to this meeting the CSC LATAM lead to Replicate these effort for the Rest of LATAM!!!!

Do we want Microsoft to do Services for us. Do we let partner do partners.
Mike related that we sell directly but also tru partners.
Mike also related that we have ISP who use our software to help their clients.
Valentin is now understanding that this is NOT a one time deal. this is an ongoing process. Mike explain that we keep making adjustmens to the client's arquitecture....on an ongoing basis.
Luis DaSilva explain that we Can enable all our parters so that they can provide services.
something strage....Valentin, want to see witch parners.

Luis explained the Win-Win: that our Win is the license, for Microsoft is keeping the client happy.
Luis gave the example of a client in Azure and Turbo who actually expanded their spend in Azure after using

* Session with Alex Team

* Land a conversation our P.I.M. to map what we have in Mexico and Latam
* We need to determine best local partner to accelerate the plan
* We need to review the pipe that we have
* -determine the "sharing" that we have
* Determine if Microsofts existing relationship with Kyndryl is relevant to our efforts

to each of the segments.

UA 6342 is a new MSP-IAH option that opens in Oct 1st. therefore there is no on time record data but It the first flight from MSP to IAH, so it is cannot be delayed by other flights. It is likely to arrive on time. It is likely to arrive into terminal C.
2/3 of the C terminals are within 15-20 min from gate E12.
UA 1916 is likely to depart from E12 and it has a great on time record departure.
UA 7177 also has a good track record.
UA 1916 and UA 7177 are also available on Oct 7 and Oct 8.
Out of IAH on Oct 6 there are two options that are less than 11 hours long (thru Panama and Lima) that land at 3 and 4 am.
The flight from Houston looks like a good option.
is a flight that they are bringing back in October. This is the first flight of
1. Text pre-processing: Data preparation. (16 Marks)
**NOTE**
:- Each text pre-processing step should be mentioned in the notebook separately.
If I have a Matrix with two columns, do I need to separate the label from the dataframe?
* Does the label need to be in numerical
* If I have 3 labels, Bad, good neutral. How do I convet to 3 intengers?
Each Process with Notes/Advice:
* Html tag removal.
* Tokenization.
* Remove the numbers.
* Removal of Special Characters and Punctuations.
* Removal of stopwords
* Conversion to lowercase.
* Lemmatize or stemming.
* Convert back to text string in the data frame
* Using CountVectorizer
* Using TfidfVectorizer
Review of how to use CountVectorizer.
Review of how to use TfidfVectorizer.
If I have a Matrix with two columns, do I need to separate the label from the dataframe?
* Does the label need to be in numerical
* If I have 3 labels, Bad, good neutral. How do I convet to 3 intengers?
We can not believe on the ANN trained on sythesized data ( SMOTE ) because there we have generated the data artificially and this might also be the case that a particular data point generated in SMOTE might not make sense. Therefore, we really can not believe on a model trained on resampled data. We should mostly try to cost-sensitive network in place of SMOTE

English:
My goal-oriented inquisitiveness helps elicit insights into how software solutions are internally evaluated and championed by potential clients. For example: In 2019, my readiness to always ask one extra question helped me discover that some AspenTech clients were internally championing the Aspen Data Analytics solution, typically used as a platform for predictive maintenance, as a cybersecurity tool. I then shared this client-discovered insight with other champions, who leveraged the information to advance the buying decision process. This inquisitiveness, as it did at AspenTech, will enhance my ability to better understand my clients and communicate how Guidewire’s solutions create value.
Spanish:
Mi curiosidad -- guiada por metas claras – me ha permitido descubrir en detalle como soluciones de software son realmente evaluadas y promovidas internamente por clientes. Por ejemplo: en el 2019, mi disposición a indagar un poco más me llevó a descubrir que algunos clientes de Aspentech estaban internamente promoviendo la solución de Aspen Data Analytics, la cual es típicamente usada como una plataforma para el mantenimiento predictivo, como una herramienta para el departamento de seguridad cibernética. Sin retraso alguno, yo compartí esta idea, nacida de forma innata entre algunos clientes, con otras organizaciones evaluando nuestra solución. Esta curiosidad, al igual que con Aspentech, potenciará mi entendimiento de los clientes y por ende mi habilidad para comunicar la plusvalía de las soluciones de Guidewire.

Hello Carlos,
It was nice speaking with you today. As part of our interview process, we would like you to write a email summary based on the following: “Choose one professional quality you possess and explain how that quality will help you be successful at Guidewire”.  You can reply to this email with your email summary.
Thank you!

Indagar con un propósito. Me es claro ahora que curiosidad guiada por metas claras permite descubrir en detalle como soluciones de software son realmente evaluadas y promovidas internamente por clientes. Por ejemplo: en el 2019, esta sed de entender me llevó a descubrir que algunos clientes de Aspentech estaban internamente promoviendo nuestras soluciones de Data Analytics como una plataforma para el mantenimiento predictivo que también podría apoyar los esfuerzos del departamento de seguridad cibernética.
Esta idea, la nació de forma innata con unos clientes, fue compartida y potenciada por otros clientes para explorar qué otros presupuestos departamentales podrían participar en la adquisición del software. Esta curiosidad, al igual que con Aspentech, potenciará mi entendimiento de los clientes y por ende mi habilidad para comunicar la plusvalía de las soluciones de Guidewire.
nuestras soluciones.
Asking purposeful questions. I have discovered that my goal-oriented inquisitiveness helps me elicit insights into how software solutions are internally evaluated and championed by potential clients.
For example: In 2019, this purposeful curiosity helped me discover that some AspenTech clients were internally championing the Aspen Data Analytics as a platform for predictive maintenance that could also support the efforts of their cyber-security department. Upto that point, this solutions had not been positioned as a security enhancing solution. This client-discovered insight encouraged other organizations to secure part of the project funding from their cybersecurity budget. This inquisitiveness, as it did with Aspentech, will enhance my ability to better understand our clients point of view.
I will leverage such inquisitiveness to gain differentiation-insights that will help me better position the Guidewire offerings in an ever more competitive market.
88888
I ask purposeful questions. I have discovered that this goal-oriented inquisitiveness elicits insights into how solutions are internally evaluated and championed by clients. In 2019, this purposeful inquiry helped me discover that some AspenTech clients were internally championing the Aspen Data Analytics solution as a machine learning enhancement of their cybersecurity toolkit. By sharing this insight with other prospects, they were able to explore other funding sources and more quickly reach buying consensus. This purposeful inquisitiveness will allow me to rapidly learn Guidewires selling methodology and gain market-diferenciation insights to better engage with our clients.

Yo indago con propropostion. He descubiernto que esta curiosidad produce enfoques que apoyan nuestro entendimiento de como nuestras soluciones son internamente evaluadas y abogadas por clientes. En el 2019, esta busqueda intencional me ayudo a descubrir que algunos clientes de AspenTech estaban internamente vendiendo nuestras soluciones de Data Analytics como una mejora potencial de sus las herramientas a la mando de cybreseguridad. El compartir esta idea con otros cliente potenciales, estos fuerron explorar otras formas de fianancia el proeyct y mas rapidamente lograd un acuardo negernal para la compra. Esta indagacione con meta me permitira rapidademente aprender la metodologia de ventasde Guidewire y tener ideas para merjo difereencia con los clients.
Indagar con un propósito. Me es claro ahora que curiosidad guiada por metas claras lleva a descubrir en detalle como soluciones de software son internamente evaluadas y promovidas por nuestros propios clientes. En el 2019, esta sed de entender me permitió descubrir que algunos clientes de Aspentech estaban internamente promoviendo nuestras soluciones de Data Analytics como una plataforma para el mantenimiento predictivo que también podría apoyar los esfuerzos del equipo de seguridad cibernética. Esta idea, la cual nació con unos clientes, fue compartida y potenciada por otros clientes para explorar que otros presupuestos podrían participar en la adquisición y como mejor alcanzar una decisión unánime de compra. Esta curiosidad, alineada con el objetivo de cumplir mis metas comerciales en Guidewire, será de gran utilidad en mis actividades como vendedor.
Asking purposeful questions. I have discovered that my goal-oriented inquisitiveness helps me elicit insights into how software solutions are internally evaluated and championed by clients.
In 2019, this purposeful inquiry helped me discover that some AspenTech clients were internally championing the Aspen Data Analytics as more than a platform for predictive maintenance that could also support the efforts of the cybersecurity team.
Sharing this insight, developed innately by some of our clients, with other prospects
allowed their organzations to explore other project funding sources and more quickly reach buying consensus.
I will leverage such inquisitiveness to gain differentiation-insights that will help me better position the Guidewire offerings in an ever more competitive market.
Operational Technology (OT)
Solutions that create insights, that create
Data Fueled solutions
The readiness to ask challenging questions of our product, of our client of ourselves ia trait that will continuet to help me gain usefull insight in tto the buying decision process of our client, into our the undefliying way that our product create value and into areas withere where myskills need improvement. This curiosity, this openness to inquiry needs to be guidend by purppse. As part of the Aspen Tech LATAM team I keep asking one single question. “In what other ways does our data analytics benefit our clients ”.  By asking this question to my tech, finance and other team I discovered that some of our client saw this prediction tool not only as a asset optimization tool but, because of its anaomaly detection capabilities, as a OT Securing asset.

## **Job details**
**Salary**
$65,000 a year
## **Full Job Description**
**The Team:**Our sales team works with a best-of-breed product that solves real problems for our customers. Sellers follow a well-defined methodology that helps them identify the customer's unique needs and clearly convey the value of the Datadog product. Whether you're looking to learn from the best or be the best, the Datadog sales team is dedicated to furthering personal development and team success.**The Opportunity:**Datadog is the monitoring and analytics platform for developers, IT teams and business users in the cloud age. We're scaling our LATAM Sales team to help IT and Technology leaders recognize Datadog's impact in their digital transformation and migration to the cloud. Therefore, we're searching for an Account Executive to drive aggressive growth in direct sales, as we continue to expand across LATAM. This is an opportunity to join a winning team that's disrupting a market which forecasted for a 300% growth in the next few years.**You Will:**Focus 100% on net new logo acquisitionManage the full sales cycleRun and partner with Sales Engineers on demosUse tools such as Sales Navigator and ZoomInfoStrategically prospect into CTOs, Engineering/IT Leaders, & technical end users**You Are:**Fluent in English & Portuguese OR SpanishFocused on hunting and closing net new logosA top performer with a history of successBold on the phones, and creative in your emailsAble to strategically map out and break into accountsMotivated, curious, hungry, and driven as a sales person**Bonus Points:**Passionate about tech and the cloud spaceExperience with SaaS/Cloud and Salesforce**Why You Should Apply:**Continuous career development and pathing opportunitiesSales training in MEDDIC and Command of the MessageProduct training to develop an in-depth understanding of our product and spaceBest in breed onboardingInternal mentor and buddy program cross-departmentallyNew hire stock equity (RSUs) and employee stock purchase planPresident's Club for top performersGenerous and competitive global and US benefitsFriendly and inclusive workplace culture

Hi Jon,
Are you on the hunt for one more sales ''Challenger" who can also engage in technical conversation with Algolia's prospects?
If you already have a full deck or my current profile is just not a good fit, can I have your OK to be part of your LinkedIn network?
Have an amazing week!

Is it OK for me send over a request to connect.
Hi Crick,
I’ll be brief and to the point.
During the last 8 quarters, I helped reshape the footprint of AspenTech Software in LATAM by generating over 50% of all the engineering-modeling software sales in FY2019--when I captured more than 2M in contracts.
Today, I am at various stages of the IIoT/AI sales cycle with key players in the midstream, petrochemical and polymer sectors in Mexico, Argentina and other LATAM countries.
Now I am looking for an opportunity to jump from an organization that is 25% AI/IoT to an organization that is fully committed to these new tech.
Is Falkonry happy with its 2020 sales volume in Mexico, Argentina or The Caribbean?
Let’s talk 10minutes next week!
Best,
-Carlos [Carlos.harder@outlook.com](mailto:Carlos.harder@outlook.com)

Thank you for your quick follow up on the Data & SaaS Sales Consultant opportunity. I understand that within this current pool of applicants my profile was not the best match.
Would it be OK for me to send over a LinkedIn invitation. I would love to continue following the the success of Big Squid and potentially become a better candidate in the future.
All the best,
* Carlos

All the best,

* The distribution for duration of pitch is right skewed.
* Duration of the pitch for most of the customers is less than 20 minutes.
* There are some observations which can be considered as outliers as they are very far form the upper whisker in the boxplot. Let's check how many such extreme values are there.
* The distribution for monthly income shows that most the values lies between 20,000 to 40,000.
* Income is on of the important factors to consider while approaching a customers with a certain package. We can explore this further in bivariate analysis.
* There are some observation on the left and some observation on the right of the boxplot which can be considered as outliers. Let's check how many such extreme values are there.
* We can see that most the customers i.e. 52% have taken 2 or 3 number of trips.
* As expected, with the increase in the number of trips the percentage of customers is decreasing.
* The percentage of categories 19 or above is very less. We can consider these values as outliers.
* We can see that there are just four observations with number of trips 19 or greate

This book is a fun read that helps children deal with how COVID has affected their lives without directly mentioning COVID. I liked how it focused on what fun the kids could have together while making the best of a challenging situation. Elia and her friends represent diverse ages, backgrounds, and play preferences, so they come up with all kinds of excitement on their balconies. I think this is a great read for families.

***Thera Bank Personal Loan Campaign***   **Data Description:** The dataset contains data on 5000 customers. The data include customer demographic information (age, income, etc.), the customer's relationship with the bank (mortgage, securities account, etc.), and the customer response to the last personal loan campaign (Personal Loan). Among these 5000 customers, only 480 (= 9.6%) accepted the personal loan that was offered to them in the earlier campaign.   **Domain:** Banking   **Context:** This case is about a bank (Thera Bank) whose management wants to explore ways of converting its liability customers to personal loan customers (while retaining them as depositors). A campaign that the bank ran last year for liability customers showed a healthy conversion rate of over 9% success. This has encouraged the retail marketing department to devise campaigns with better target marketing to increase the success ratio with a minimal budget. **Attribute Information:** • ID: Customer ID • Age: Customer's age in completed years • Experience: #years of professional experience • Income: Annual income of the customer ($000) • ZIP Code: Home Address ZIP • Family: Family size of the customer • CCAvg: Avg. spending on credit cards per month ($000) • Education: Education Level. 1: Undergrad; 2: Graduate; 3: Advanced/Professional • Mortgage: Value of house mortgage if any. ($000) • Personal Loan: Did this customer accept the personal loan offered in the last campaign? • Securities Account: Does the customer have a securities account with the bank? • CD Account: Does the customer have a certificate of deposit (CD) account with the bank? • Online: Does the customer use internet banking facilities? • Credit card: Does the customer use a credit card issued by the bank?   **Learning Outcomes:** • Exploratory Data Analysis • Preparing the data to train a model • Training and making predictions using a classification model • Model evaluation   **Objective:** The classification goal is to predict the likelihood of a liability customer buying personal loans.   **Steps and tasks:**
1. Import the datasets and libraries, check datatype, statistical summary, shape, null values or incorrect imputation. (**5 marks**)
4. EDA: Study the data distribution in each attribute and target variable, share your findings (**20 marks**) • Number of unique in each column? • Number of people with zero mortgage? • Number of people with zero credit card spending per month? • Value counts of all categorical columns. • Univariate and Bivariate • Get data model ready
7. Split the data into training and test set in the ratio of 70:30 respectively (**5 marks**)
10. Use the Logistic Regression model to predict whether the customer will take a personal loan or not. Print all the metrics related to evaluating the model performance (accuracy, recall, precision, f1score, and roc_auc_score). Draw a heatmap to display confusion matrix (**15 marks**)
13. Find out coefficients of all the attributes and show the output in a data frame with column names? For test data show all the rows where the predicted class is not equal to the observed class. (**10 marks**)
16. Give conclusion related to the Business understanding of your model? (**5 marks**)**[Previous](https://olympus.greatlearning.in/courses/29730/assignments/83059?module_item_id=837810)****[Next](https://olympus.greatlearning.in/courses/29730/files/1594365?module_item_id=837812)**[https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=5YGgqzQadwM](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=5YGgqzQadwM)
